reference_text: The release notes say the patch is for the beta channel, not the stable channel.

metadata.source_basis: WER remains the standard ASR edit-distance baseline; include low-level substitutions before semantic judging.
metadata.expected_error_focus: word substitution, deletion, and insertion sensitivity

reference_text: Please write the new access policy before the right team reviews it.

metadata.source_basis: WER catches token-level confusions while semantic review determines downstream severity.

reference_text: Turn left at Pine Street, then park by gate four.

metadata.source_basis: Short utterances make each word error proportionally large under WER and useful for calibration.

reference_text: I need the, sorry, the final invoice attached to the March ticket.

metadata.source_basis: ASR benchmarks often report normalized and unnormalized WER; disfluencies expose normalization policy choices.
metadata.expected_error_focus: filled pause, repair, and repeated-token handling

reference_text: No refunds after Friday. Exceptions require manager approval.

metadata.source_basis: Text normalization and punctuation policy change WER and downstream readability.
metadata.expected_error_focus: sentence boundary, punctuation, and capitalization normalization

reference_text: Schedule the follow-up with Dr. Rao at the Cedar Avenue clinic.

metadata.source_basis: Entity recall and named-entity error analysis are common ASR quality slices beyond aggregate WER.

reference_text: Compare the Zephyr Mini plan with the Zephyr Max plan before renewal.

metadata.source_basis: Custom vocabulary and entity recall are critical for product, contact, and organization names.

reference_text: Attach the call summary to ticket PX-4187 before closing the case.

metadata.source_basis: Identifier errors can have high task impact despite low edit distance.

reference_text: Send the signed form to Northstar Benefits and copy Elena Morales.

metadata.source_basis: Named-entity integrity complements WER for downstream workflow reliability.

reference_text: The delivery address is 812 Ashwood Lane, apartment 5B.

metadata.source_basis: Address and location fields are high-impact entity slots in assistant transcripts.
metadata.expected_error_focus: street number, street name, and unit identifier

reference_text: Transfer fifteen dollars to Maya today, not fifty dollars.

metadata.source_basis: Meaning-preservation ASR work highlights numbers and quantities as high-impact semantic errors missed by aggregate WER.

reference_text: Give the patient five milligrams of melatonin before bedtime.

metadata.source_basis: Clinical and safety-critical ASR evaluation tracks dosage and unit substitutions separately from generic WER.

reference_text: Set the incubator to thirty-seven point five degrees Celsius.

metadata.source_basis: Numeric normalization should distinguish equivalent formatting from value-changing recognition errors.

reference_text: Read back account number 4902 7718 before submitting the form.

metadata.source_basis: Digit-sequence accuracy is a practical ASR slice for forms, support, and voice agents.

reference_text: The battery dropped from ninety percent to nineteen percent during the test.

metadata.source_basis: Minimal numeric pairs expose semantic risk when WER is low but value meaning changes.

reference_text: Do not restart the server until the database backup finishes.

metadata.source_basis: Meaning-preservation ASR evaluation treats negation and modality changes as high-severity semantic errors.

reference_text: The customer can cancel the trial, but cannot receive a refund after Friday.

metadata.source_basis: Semantic error taxonomies separate modality and permission changes from surface edit distance.

reference_text: The patient denies chest pain but reports shortness of breath.

metadata.source_basis: Clinical ASR error analysis treats negated findings as high-impact meaning changes.

reference_text: Only administrators may export records; contractors may view records only.

metadata.source_basis: Scope and modality errors can invert policy meaning while changing few words.

reference_text: Ship the replacement unless the inspection fails tomorrow morning.

metadata.source_basis: Conditional negation and exception boundaries are semantic-risk slices for voice-agent transcripts.

reference_text: The benefits enrollment deadline is Monday at 9 am.

metadata.source_basis: Meaning-preservation ASR studies highlight dates and times as high-impact transcript fields.

reference_text: Start the migration window tonight at 10 pm after traffic drops.

metadata.source_basis: AM/PM and temporal relation errors can be severe even when token edit distance is small.
metadata.expected_error_focus: time of day and after relation

reference_text: Book the follow-up two weeks after the first infusion, not before it.

metadata.source_basis: Temporal relation preservation belongs in semantic ASR evaluation beyond WER.

reference_text: Move the inspection from July fourth to July fourteenth.

metadata.source_basis: Date normalization must distinguish equivalent phrasing from value-changing recognition errors.

reference_text: Run the pump for fifteen minutes, then let it rest for fifty minutes.

metadata.source_basis: Duration errors affect downstream automation and should be tracked as semantic-critical fields.

reference_text: The technician replaced the cracked valve and confirmed the leak stopped.

metadata.source_basis: Semantic ASR metrics evaluate whether meaning is preserved, not only whether words match exactly.
metadata.expected_error_focus: event participants, action, and final state

reference_text: The upload failed because the token expired, so the client retried after refresh.

metadata.source_basis: Meaning-preservation evaluation should track causal and discourse relation changes.

reference_text: The candidate model improved recall but reduced precision on noisy calls.

metadata.source_basis: Semantic transcript review catches metric and comparison reversals that WER alone underweights.

reference_text: Maria called Priya after she reviewed the contract changes.

metadata.source_basis: Semantic evaluation should flag referent changes and ambiguity introduced by ASR output.
metadata.expected_error_focus: speaker, recipient, and review event preservation

reference_text: If the first backup succeeds, skip the manual export and notify operations.

metadata.source_basis: Task-oriented ASR should preserve executable instructions and conditionals, not just surface token overlap.
metadata.expected_error_focus: condition, skipped action, and notification target
